de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree

Class ProofTreeViewFilter

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.prooftree.ProofTreeViewFilter
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ProofTreeViewFilter.HideClosedSubtreesFilter, ProofTreeViewFilter.NodeFilter

    public abstract class ProofTreeViewFilter
extends Object
    Filters for the proof tree view.
    Author:
    bruns

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      (package private) abstract boolean global()
      Returns whether the filter's scope is on the whole tree (like hiding subtrees).
      abstract boolean isActive()
      Whether the filter is currently active.
      abstract String name()
      Name of the filter used in GUI elements.
      (package private) abstract void setActive(boolean active)
      Should only be called through GUIProofTreeNode#setFilter().
